---
#title: "Themes"
lightbox: true
---

::: {.column-page}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-7}
## Lidar 
Text about lidar here. And a better picture. Willow Density Mapping.
:::

::: {.g-col-5}
![The drone is flying.](media/flight.png)
:::
 
::: {.g-col-5}
![The drone is parked.](media/drone.jpg)
:::

::: {.g-col-7}
## Hyper Speed
Text here about willow gender mapping
:::

::: {.g-col-7}
## Bumblebee
Text here about bumblebee?! 
:::

::: {.g-col-5}
![A glacier model.](media/pism.png)
:::

:::
 
:::
